column1: # `branch` is the branch the temp repo is checked out on for that case.
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
# A few cases prefix an env var (GIT_GUARD_*=…) on the command; run.sh strips
# and exports a leading VAR=val so the dev script sees it.
# --- BLOCK: local write while ON a protected branch -------------------------
# --- BLOCK: push whose target resolves to a protected branch ----------------
# --- BLOCK: branch force ops onto a protected branch ------------------------

column4: rtk proxy git push origin main

column1: # --- BLOCK: compound commands (split on shell separators) -------------------

column4: git add . && git push origin main

column1: # --- BLOCK: block-all-push toggle (env var set for this case) ----------------
# --- ALLOW: read-only / non-mutating on protected branch --------------------
# --- ALLOW: regression-locks (deliberately hidden git is out of scope) ------

column4: sudo -u alice git push origin main

column1: # --- ALLOW: disable toggle (env var set for this case) ----------------------
